content: Fix success rate calculation showing 5507.2% - implement proper percentage calculation
Add statistic of average time per stage taken in analytics
Fix avg time to success - should be average total time of all stages succeeding
Add line chart of success % per stage in analytics
Fix font color within modal inputs - font should be dark
Make sidebar collapsible
Create E2E test for sidebar collapse functionality
Move most failed stage info tooltip above the stage statistics
Move current dashboard content to new Model Management page
Enable E2E test stage in validation pipeline
Fix all failing E2E tests
Enable coverage check and increase coverage across whole repo (frontend, backend, scripts)
Align unit testing strategy - choose between Jest and Vitest for entire repo
Align ESLint configs - use single config across whole repo
Add dead code detection to validation stages
Remove task templates functionality
Fix modal backgrounds - transparent overlay with non-transparent content
Move validation stages to separate 'Validation' page out of settings
Fix broken task details opening when clicking on task
Create Playwright test for task details opening functionality
Mirror vibe-kanban Rust backend functionality - support same agent running and worktree management capabilities (located in rust-backend-crates folder)
Add todo list validation to claude-stop hook - block Claude from stopping if unfinished tasks exist
Clean up test-generated projects from dev database - ensure E2E tests use test DB and properly cleanup
Move task details to open in a new page instead of sidebar panel
Fix task details background - change to dark theme as current background makes content invisible
Add todo list validation as a proper validation stage instead of direct integration in claude-stop-hook
Fix LLM reviewer to detect missing API key as failure, not success
Ensure validation stages appear in settings-defined order in analytics page
Move recent sessions section under overall statistics in analytics
Add validation run details page - show logs when clicking on validation run
Add disallowed commands section in settings
Add validation stage details page - view sessions where specific stage failed
Create proxy page and move model management + request logs there
Fix spacing between icon and text in refresh button
Make recent sessions count configurable, increase default to 100
Bring coverage up back to 80% repo-wise and set the minimum coverage threshold to 80%
Tighten ESLint rules to improve code quality - make max file length shorter and max function complexity lower among other quality improvements and fix any detected issues
Modify claude-stop hook to fail on any unfinished todo items, not only high priority ones

Implement automated todo completion via pre-commit hooks - add endTime and mark tasks completed automatically when validation passes, enforce descriptive commit template starting with task ID to enable automatic todo-list.json updates

Implement E2E test for every task in todo-list.json with BDD scenarios in gherkin format and add test_url reference to each task pointing to the gherkin scenario file, verify task completion status and update to pending/in_progress if not actually completed, ensure all BDD scenarios pass on pre-commit, add execution results summary and history tracking for each test
Add BDD test dashboard page showing status of all BDD tests with execution history for each test and general statistics on BDD pass rate
